_node.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
FROM $${BASE_IMAGE}

LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

RUN apk update && apk add bash nss font-noto ca-certificates gcompat

# https://pnpm.io/installation#compatibility (node 16 needs pnpm 8)
ARG PNPM_VERSION=9.15.9
RUN npm install pnpm@$${PNPM_VERSION} modclean@2.1.2 -g

RUN npm ci && npm cache clean --force

# Additional tooling needed for Node runtimes used for SSR (Sites)
# alpine-sdk - basic tooling like git, gcc, g++, make...
# python3-dev - Install Python (useful to some NPM libs)
# py3-pip - Python package manager
# gcompat - Pre-requirement for Bun
ARG INSTALL_SSR_TOOLING="false"
ARG BUN_VERSION=1.3.2
RUN if [ "$INSTALL_SSR_TOOLING" = "true" ]; then \
        apk add alpine-sdk python3-dev py3-pip gcompat && \
        npm install bun@$${BUN_VERSION} -g; \
    fi

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="node --max_old_space_size=8192 src/server.js"

# Next.js packing: keep node's pre-consolidation behavior (ship node_modules
# untouched) instead of the shared packer's modclean fallback used by bun/deno.
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_NEXTJS_CLEANUP=none

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

_deno.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
FROM $${BASE_IMAGE}

LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

RUN apk update && apk add bash nss font-noto ca-certificates nodejs-current npm python3 make g++ gcc git

# Deno's alpine image bundles a glibc-shim libgcc_s.so.1 at /usr/local/lib/
# that conflicts with node's musl-linked expectations. Remove it so node loads
# the system (alpine) libgcc from /usr/lib instead. Deno stays functional —
# its binary is statically linked and doesn't need the shim at runtime.
RUN rm -f /usr/local/lib/libgcc_s.so*
RUN npm install modclean@2.1.2 -g && \
	if deno --version | head -1 | grep -qE '^deno 2\.'; then npm install pnpm yarn -g; fi && \
	npm install --no-save --prefix /usr/local/server @vercel/nft@^0.29.2

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=mod.ts
ENV DENO_DIR=/usr/builds/deno-cache

# Pre-populate /usr/local/server/node_modules so the shared SSR preload's
# `import superjson from "superjson"` resolves under --node-modules-dir=manual
# at runtime. We use deno install against the runtimes/javascript/src/ssr/
# deno.json import map that's already been overlaid into
# /usr/local/server/src/ssr/.
#
# Only deno 2.x exposes the npm-style `deno install` (with --allow-scripts and
# --node-modules-dir=auto|manual). On deno 1.x the same subcommand is the
# CLI-script installer where --node-modules-dir takes only true|false and
# --allow-scripts doesn't exist, so we skip the step there. Deno 1.x also
# predates --import (required for the SSR preload) so SSR isn't viable on
# those versions anyway. Probing --allow-scripts is a clean 2.x-only signal.
RUN if [ -f /usr/local/server/src/ssr/deno.json ] && \
	deno install --help 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- '--allow-scripts'; then \
	cp /usr/local/server/src/ssr/deno.json /usr/local/server/deno.json && \
	cd /usr/local/server && deno install --node-modules-dir=auto --allow-scripts && \
	rm /usr/local/server/deno.json; \
	fi

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="deno run --allow-run --allow-net --allow-write --allow-read --allow-env src/server.ts"

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

_python.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
FROM $${BASE_IMAGE}

# Extra system packages installed before everything else (used by ml variants:
# "gcc pkg-config libhdf5-dev" on a bookworm base)
ARG SYSTEM_PACKAGES=""
RUN if [ -n "$SYSTEM_PACKAGES" ]; then \
        if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then apk update && apk add --no-cache $SYSTEM_PACKAGES; \
        else apt-get update && apt-get install -y $SYSTEM_PACKAGES; fi; \
    fi

LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk update && apk add bash alpine-sdk libffi-dev
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y bash
    fi
EOR

# Install Poetry package manager
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir poetry

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=main.py

# Create a virtual environment for the server dependencies
RUN python3 -m venv server-env
RUN server-env/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty

_php.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
# Builder stage uses the same base unless a version pins a different one (8.3)
ARG BUILD_BASE_IMAGE=$${BASE_IMAGE}

FROM $${BUILD_BASE_IMAGE} AS step0

# Extra packages only needed to compile extensions (linux-headers on php >= 8.2)
ARG BUILD_PACKAGES=""
RUN if [ -n "$BUILD_PACKAGES" ]; then apk update && apk add --no-cache $BUILD_PACKAGES; fi

ARG PHP_SWOOLE_VERSION
ENV PHP_SWOOLE_VERSION=$PHP_SWOOLE_VERSION
RUN \
  apk add --no-cache --virtual .deps \
  make \
  automake \
  autoconf \
  gcc \
  g++ \
  git \
  zlib-dev \
  brotli-dev \
  yaml-dev \
  libmaxminddb-dev \
  openssl-dev

RUN docker-php-ext-install sockets

RUN \
  ## Swoole Extension
  git clone --depth 1 --branch $PHP_SWOOLE_VERSION https://github.com/swoole/swoole-src.git && \
  cd swoole-src && \
  phpize && \
  ./configure --enable-http2 --enable-openssl && \
  make && make install && \
  cd ..

# Stage compiled extensions at a fixed path so the final stage doesn't need to
# know the PHP-ABI-versioned extension directory name.
RUN mkdir -p /opt/ext \
    && cp "$(php-config --extension-dir)/swoole.so" /opt/ext/ \
    && (cp "$(php-config --extension-dir)"/yasd.so* /opt/ext/ 2>/dev/null || true)

FROM $${BASE_IMAGE} AS final
LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=index.php

RUN \
  apk update \
  && apk add --no-cache --virtual .deps \
  make \
  automake \
  autoconf \
  gcc \
  g++ \
  curl-dev \
  && apk add --no-cache \
  libstdc++ \
  certbot \
  brotli-dev \
  yaml-dev \
  libmaxminddb-dev \
  libgomp \
  bash \
  && docker-php-ext-install opcache \
  && apk del .deps \
  && rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*

COPY --from=composer:latest /usr/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer

RUN composer update --no-interaction --ignore-platform-reqs --optimize-autoloader --prefer-dist --no-dev
RUN mv vendor vendor-server

COPY --from=step0 /opt/ext/ /opt/ext/
RUN cp /opt/ext/* "$(php-config --extension-dir)/" && rm -rf /opt/ext

# Enable Extensions
RUN echo extension=swoole.so >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/swoole.ini

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="php -d memory_limit=8G src/server.php"

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y zip bash

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=Index.java
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="java -jar src/function/java-runtime-1.0.0.jar"

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

_cpp.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
FROM $${BASE_IMAGE}

LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=index.cc
ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV DROGON_VERSION=v1.9.7

RUN apk add --no-cache \
    git \
    gcc \
    g++ \
    cmake \
    make \
    openssl \
    doxygen \
    jsoncpp-dev \
    openssl-dev \
    zlib-dev \
    curl-dev \
    util-linux-dev \
    bash

RUN git clone --depth 1 --branch $DROGON_VERSION https://github.com/drogonframework/drogon \
    && cd drogon \
    && git submodule update --init \
    && mkdir build \
    && cd build \
    && cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release .. \
    && make -j"$(nproc)" \
    && make install \
    && cd / \
    && rm -rf /drogon

EXPOSE 3000

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="src/function/cpp_runtime"

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

_bun.dockerfile-inline:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# INCLUDE directives below are resolved by `bun ci/bake.ts`, which inlines the
# referenced *.dockerfile fragments into docker-bake.json (dockerfile-inline).
ARG BASE_IMAGE
FROM $${BASE_IMAGE}

LABEL maintainer="team@appwrite.io"
LABEL namespace="open-runtimes"

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENV=production
ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_HEADERS="{}"

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty
COPY --from=helpers . /usr/local/server/helpers/
COPY --from=shared . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_ENTRYPOINT=index.ts
# Bun 1.0 arm64 includes glibc, whose /usr/lib/libc.so conflicts with musl-dev from g++.
RUN apk update \
  && APK_ADD_FLAGS="" \
  && if apk info -e glibc > /dev/null 2>&1; then APK_ADD_FLAGS="--force-overwrite"; fi \
  && apk add $${APK_ADD_FLAGS} bash npm nss font-noto ca-certificates python3 make g++ gcc git
RUN npm install pnpm@9.15.9 yarn modclean@2.1.2 -g
RUN bun install && npm install --no-save --prefix /usr/local/server @vercel/nft@^0.29.2

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SERVER_COMMAND="bun src/server.ts"

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000

ENV OPEN_RUNTIMES_SECRET=open_runtime_secret

RUN <<EOR
    if [ -f /etc/alpine-release ]; then
        apk add util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    else
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y util-linux zstd squashfs-tools
    fi
EOR

RUN mkdir -p /mnt/code /mnt/logs /mnt/telemetry /usr/local/build /usr/local/server/src/function

WORKDIR /usr/local/server

# Assemble /usr/local/server from named build contexts, in overlay precedence
# order (later layers overwrite earlier ones):
#   1. helpers  -> repo helpers/ (global lifecycle runner + shims)
#   2. shared   -> runtimes/<shared family>/ (e.g. javascript/ for node), or empty
#   3. latest   -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/latest/
#   4. version  -> runtimes/<runtime>/versions/<version>/ extras, or empty

COPY --from=latest . /usr/local/server/
COPY --from=version . /usr/local/server/
RUN rm -f /usr/local/server/.gitkeep /usr/local/server/Dockerfile /usr/local/server/build.dockerfile

RUN apk update && apk add bash apache2-utils

# Directory for configurable fallback files (like 404)
RUN mkdir -p /mnt/resources

RUN chmod -R +x /usr/local/server/helpers

EXPOSE 3000
